description: Marketing or transactional SMS message. Used for round-open notifications, purchase confirmations, and other founder-direct one-shot sends. Hard 160-char single-segment ceiling, 320-char two-segment ceiling. Manually sent via SMS provider — no automated pipeline.

body.description: SMS body. Aim for single segment (160 chars). Two-segment max (320). Merge tags like {{birchal_url}} count toward the limit when expanded.

cta.description: Implicit CTA — usually a tappable URL embedded in body. Optional explicit CTA label for tracking.

purpose.description: What job the SMS does in the funnel.
